name: Southwest Black Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, cook and stir onion and garlic with oil until the onion is tender.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients except for the Quick Creme Fraiche and chopped red bell pepper.
3. Bring to a boil and then reduce heat. Cover and simmer until beans are tender, about 2 1/2 hours.
4. Transfer 1/4 of the soup into a food processor or blender. Process until smooth. Repeat with remaining portions of soup.
5. Serve hot with Quick Creme Fraiche and chopped red bell pepper on top.
Quick Creme Fraiche:
Gradually stir whipping cream into sour cream. Cover and refrigerate for up to 48 hours.
